200# return «

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌚🌚

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, the Necromancer summons one of his minions from a dead unit. The minion type is based on the type of the unit killed. You can summon up to 2 minions of the same type. Skeleton Tank : Reflects some of the damage taken back at the attacker. Skeleton Mage : On death, temporarily saves the ally with the lowest health from death, preventing them from being killed for a short time. Skeleton Archer : Attacks targets with the lowest health. The same unit killed can only be used to summon another minion in 8 sec. If a minion was summoned from a dead enemy, this unit cannot be resurrected for 4 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while, the Necromancer summons one of his minions from a dead unit. The minion type is based on the type of the unit killed. You can summon up to 2 minions of the same type. Skeleton Tank : Reflects some of the damage taken back at the attacker. Skeleton Mage : On death, temporarily saves the ally with the lowest health from death, preventing them from being killed for a short time. Skeleton Archer : Attacks targets with the lowest health. The same unit killed can only be used to summon another minion in 8 sec. When summoning a minion all enemies in a small radius around the summoned skeleton take 100000 magic damage If a minion was summoned from a dead enemy, this unit cannot be resurrected for 4 sec. When resurrecting an ally, applies armor to that ally. The armor absorbs damage equal to 10% of the ally’s max health.

description 6/6

Once in a while, the Necromancer summons one of his minions from a dead unit. The minion type is based on the type of the unit killed. You can summon up to 2 minions of the same type. Skeleton Tank : Reflects some of the damage taken back at the attacker. Skeleton Mage : On death, temporarily saves the ally with the lowest health from death, preventing them from being killed for a short time. Skeleton Archer : Attacks targets with the lowest health. The same unit killed can only be used to summon another minion in 8 sec. When summoning a minion all enemies in a small radius around the summoned skeleton take 150000 magic damage. If a minion was summoned from a dead enemy, this unit cannot be resurrected for 4 sec. When resurrecting an ally, applies armor to that ally. The armor absorbs damage equal to 20% of the ally’s max health. On death, turns into the King of the Dead, shows up behind the enemies’ backs, and casts fear on all enemies for a short time. While the King is alive, the Necromancer cannot be resurrected. The King of the Dead is a melee unit that deals 25000 damage per second and has 800000 health. The King of the Dead deals splash damage and stuns all units hit for 0,5 sec. Once in a while, he throws his golden crown at the unit with the lowest health, stunning them for 2 sec and dealing 125000 physical damage. The Skeleton King is immune to fear, silence, and stun.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Once in a while, the Necromancer summons an additional skeleton.

description 4/6

Once in a while, the Necromancer summons an additional skeleton. The explosion deals additional magic damage equal to 80% of the Necromancer’s spell power.

description 6/6

Once in a while, the Necromancer summons an additional skeleton. The explosion deals additional magic damage equal to 80% of the Necromancer’s spell power. Instead of stunning the target, the Skeleton King’s abilities turn enemies to stone. They can’t move and take 30% more damage.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Necromancer takes 5% less damage for each skeleton summoned by the Necromancer.

description 4/6

Necromancer takes 5% less damage for each skeleton summoned by the Necromancer. An explosion after summoning restores health to all allies in a small area equal to 5% of their max health. These units have a 25% chance to gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to 25% of the amount of health restored. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 4 sec.

description 6/6

Necromancer takes 5% less damage for each skeleton summoned by the Necromancer. An explosion after summoning restores health to all allies in a small area equal to 5% of their max health. These units have a 25% chance to gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to 25% of the amount of health restored. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 4 sec. Once in a while, the Skeleton King resurrects a random ally with 20% health. This unit also gains a shield that blocks all damage for 2 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Necromancer’s spell power is increased by 10% for each skeleton summoned by the Necromancer.

description 4/6

Necromancer’s spell power is increased by 10% for each skeleton summoned by the Necromancer. When an ally is resurrected, the Necromancer’s spell power is increased by 10% for 6 sec. Up to 5 effects. Also, the Necromancer casts a shield that absorbs an additional 100000 (+Spell Power bonus) damage on the resurrected unit. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Necromancer’s spell power is increased by 10% for each skeleton summoned by the Necromancer. When an ally is resurrected, the Necromancer’s spell power is increased by 10% for 6 sec. Up to 5 effects. Also, the Necromancer casts a shield that absorbs an additional 100000 (+Spell Power bonus) damage on the resurrected unit. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 5 sec. Skeleton King reduces the physical armor, toughness, and dodge of all enemies in a small area around themself by 20%. When an enemy dies, Skeleton King deals 250000 magic damage to all enemies and reduces their damage by 20%.

Materials

Necronomicon
Demon Skin

Dungeon chest
Bone Beads

purchase in:
Portal chest for dark souls
